images.caption: Figure 1:Emergence order across model families and sizes, smoothed with a Gaussian kernel (σ=1.0\sigma=1.0). Dots represent the point at which the model reaches a fixed 50% accuracy threshold. While the absolute emergence time varies across models, the ordering shows regularity.

Figure 2:Emergence order heatmap of selected tasks across models (absolute threshold = 0.8). Tasks sorted by consensus emergence order. Consistent color gradients across columns indicate stable ordering.
Figure 3:Example composite task predictions for OLMo2-7B between 0-1T tokens.
